changes: Replaced Header with ScreenHeader (back + Turmas title). Replaced old Button for add with IconButton (white square with Plus icon). Replaced Select dropdown with horizontal pill filter bar (Todas + branch names, green active pill, white inactive with shadow). Changed ListRow to inline button matching design: leading 44px green-50 square with UsersRound icon, title (class name), subtitle (branch + schedule_days + schedule_time joined by middot), below subtitle: NivelTag + student count. ChevronRight on right. Preserved all hooks (useClasses, useBranches), navigation, loading/error/empty states.
